name: set_player_settings
description: Sets player and build settings for the project (Project Settings > Player). Supports: company_name, product_name, version, bundle_id, default_orientation.

value.description: The new value. For default_orientation, use: Portrait, PortraitUpsideDown, LandscapeRight, LandscapeLeft, AutoRotation.

build_target.description: Build target platform (only used for bundle_id). Default: Standalone.
